description: The open-source, self-hostable to-do app. Organize everything, on all platforms.
author: BigBearTechWorld

tips.before_install:
NEW APP - VIKUNJA V2

This is a SEPARATE app from 'Vikunja (Legacy)' (v1.x). Both can run simultaneously.

Vikunja v2 is a major rewrite:
- Rebuilt session-based authentication (API clients may need updates)
- Typesense search removed
- Changed API routes

FOR MIGRATION FROM V1:
- Do NOT uninstall your existing Vikunja (Legacy) app
- Deploy this as a NEW app alongside v1
- Create backups before migrating
- See: https://vikunja.io/docs/api-login-session-migration/

title: Vikunja v2
